title: poa minor
intro: Poa minor, also known as the Smooth Meadow-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Poa minor include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. Poa minor can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and health.
